overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic spacecraft flying over a barren, gray alien landscape. The vehicle descends from high altitude to skim the rocky surface, with terrain details becoming increasingly visible as the flight progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude flight over barren alien terrain

events.description: vehicle begins gradual descent toward the surface

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft forward while descending toward the gray rocky surface below

entered.detail: futuristic spacecraft cockpit with green-tinted glass and metallic supports
illuminated control panels with green HUD elements and central navigation display
vast expanse of gray barren landscape visible through the cockpit windshield
diffuse atmospheric haze blending the terrain with the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a spacecraft cockpit flying at high altitude over a vast gray alien landscape. The terrain appears flat and featureless from this distance, shrouded in atmospheric haze. The cockpit interior features green-lit displays and metallic framing as the vehicle maintains steady forward motion while beginning a gradual descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude surface skimming over rocky terrain

events.description: terrain details become clearly visible as altitude drops significantly

agents.ego_description: flying at extremely low altitude, skimming over the rocky surface and navigating close to the terrain

entered.detail: individual rocks and surface textures becoming visible as altitude decreases
small impact craters and surface irregularities on the gray terrain

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft continues at low altitude, now skimming close to the rocky gray surface. Individual rocks, craters, and terrain textures are clearly visible rushing by beneath the vehicle. The cockpit remains stable as the pilot maintains the low-level flight path over the barren alien landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a high-altitude atmospheric cruise to a low-level skim across a barren alien surface. It begins within a metallic cockpit illuminated by green-lit displays, gliding over a vast, featureless gray landscape shrouded in a thick atmospheric haze. As the spacecraft gradually descends, the distant flatness gives way to emerging geological details. The scene then shifts as the vehicle drops to a low altitude, where the hazy horizon vanishes and individual rocks, craters, and sharp terrain textures rush by beneath the stable cockpit. Finally, the flight path levels out, maintaining a close, high-speed trajectory over the rugged, rocky expanse.
